name: Jaypee Infratech Limited
summary: Jaypee Infratech Limited operates as the concessionaire for Yamuna Expressway project in Uttar Pradesh, India. It operates and maintains the Yamuna Expressway, a 165 kilometer long six lane access controlled expressway connecting Greater Noida and Agra. The company is also developing 25 million square meters of land for residential, commercial, institutional, amusement, and industrial purposes at five land parcels along the expressway. In addition, it operates Jaypee Hospital, a 504 bed super specialty hospital in Noida. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Noida, India. Jaypee Infratech Limited is a subsidiary of Jaiprakash Associates Limited.
